# CreditDebitIndicator.debit

**Case**

A value that indicates an amount which increases a liability or decreases an asset.

## Declaration

```swift
case debit
```

## Enumeration Cases

- **CreditDebitIndicator.credit**: A value that indicates an amount which increases an asset or decreases a liability.
